section_id: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer - Recognition of Exemplary Performance of Agencies
title: Recognition of Exemplary Performance of Agencies
content: The Administration shall undertake the classification and ranking of agencies, and in recognition of their exemplary performance, guidelines will be issued for entitlement of agencies to schemes for incentive and rewards such as extension of validity of license, express processing and in-house documentation.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
